text: B2 RDS - Proxy - Key Facts @ mossemcanate. @ swron ¢ Fully Managed DB Proxy for RDS/Aurora e ... auto scaling, highly available by default * Provides connection pooling - reduces DB Load * ONLY accessible from a VPC ¢ Accessed via Proxy Endpoint - no app changes e Can enforce SSL/TLS ¢ Can reduce failover time by over 60% e Abstracts failure away from your applications
